note: Per-action fixtures. The runner streams context through a single-action grammar/schema; the model emits the action's parameter object only. Starts with REPLY and MESSAGE — add more actions by appending to `cases` with a new `actionName`.
originNote: Cases below are hand-authored and tagged as the manual probe set. A dataset-derived sibling at fixtures/action.derived.json is the canonical regression measurement source (produced by scripts/derive-fixtures.mjs from packages/training/datasets/eliza1-sft-0_6b/test.jsonl).

cases.context: User just said 'hi'. Produce a brief friendly greeting back.
User said 'thanks for the help'. Produce a brief acknowledgement.
User asked 'are you still working on that?'. The task is complete. Produce a short confirmation.
User said: 'message alice and tell her the report is ready'. Emit parameters for the MESSAGE action.
User said: 'send bob a quick note saying the meeting moved to 3pm'. Emit MESSAGE parameters.
